response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer with notable depth in DLang, TypeScript, and Node.js, plus solid testing and craftsmanship practices. However, the role requires 8 years of C++ as a minimum hard requirement, and the resume shows only a brief ~6-month stint writing C/C++ components at National Instruments a decade ago. There is also no evidence of large-scale distributed cloud-compute platform work or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering across backend, web, mobile, and embedded
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ minimum requirement
No demonstrated experience building or leading an internal cloud compute platform
No formal tech-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineering teams

key_factors.factor: Lack of large-scale cloud compute platform background
Strong distributed/low-latency systems exposure at Sociomantic
